mentions.note: New $25 oral GLP-1 pill matches injectable efficacy and cardiovascular benefit, widening the addressable obesity market well beyond current patients.
Oral GLP-1 pill head start vs. Eli Lily's spring launch; CEO meeting positive; making a turn; hold existing position, don't add.
GLP-1 first-mover advantage and attractive valuation, but Eli Lilly's execution superior; hold vs. LILLI strong preference; upgrade if/when pill form launches.
Guidance too conservative amid pill blockbuster uptake (170K Americans in 4 weeks, 2x competitor speed); first-mover large-peptide advantage transformational; buy on recent dip.
Good at price-cutting but not as attractive as Eli Lilly which is good at drug-making; relative to LLY, avoid.
Will lose significant share to Eli Lilly on GLP-1 pill (oral version); avoid; dropped a lot but fundamentals weakening.
Not good at what they do; avoid. If seeking healthcare exposure, prefer J&J (down from highs, great balance sheet).
